# Step 03: Design Modern Architecture
# PrecisionParts .NET 9 Modernization Architecture
# Generated by GitHub Copilot CLI

## Architecture Decision: Blazor Server + EF Core

### Why Blazor Server
- Desktop-like experience matching the VB6 MDI parent/child pattern
- Real-time UI updates replace the VB6 timer-based auto-refresh
- Role-based UI rendering replaces VB6 menu permission toggling
- No need for separate API project (simplifies initial migration)
- Server-side rendering keeps business logic secure

### Technology Stack
| Layer            | VB6 Legacy              | .NET 9 Modern                    |
|------------------|-------------------------|----------------------------------|
| UI Framework     | VB6 Forms + MSFlexGrid  | Blazor Server + MudBlazor        |
| Data Access      | ADO + Jet OLEDB 4.0     | Entity Framework Core 9          |
| Database         | Microsoft Access .mdb   | SQL Server (Azure SQL ready)     |
| Authentication   | Custom plain-text       | ASP.NET Core Identity            |
| Authorization    | Global role variable    | Policy-based authorization       |
| Reporting        | Crystal Reports 8.5     | QuestPDF / built-in Blazor       |
| Configuration    | Windows Registry        | appsettings.json + Options       |
| Logging          | File-based custom       | ILogger + Serilog                |
| Error Handling   | On Error GoTo           | Structured try/catch + middleware|
| DI               | Global variables        | Built-in DI container            |

## Solution Structure

```
PrecisionParts.sln
├── PrecisionParts.Web/              # Blazor Server application
│   ├── Program.cs                   # Host configuration
│   ├── Components/
│   │   ├── Layout/
│   │   │   ├── MainLayout.razor     # App shell (replaces frmMain MDI)
│   │   │   └── NavMenu.razor        # Role-based navigation
│   │   ├── Pages/
│   │   │   ├── Login.razor          # Login page (replaces frmLogin)
│   │   │   ├── Dashboard.razor      # Home dashboard
│   │   │   ├── WorkOrders/
│   │   │   │   ├── WorkOrderList.razor
│   │   │   │   └── WorkOrderEdit.razor
│   │   │   ├── Inventory/
│   │   │   │   ├── InventoryList.razor
│   │   │   │   └── InventoryEdit.razor
│   │   │   ├── QualityControl/
│   │   │   │   └── QualityCheckForm.razor
│   │   │   ├── Shipping/
│   │   │   │   └── ShippingManifest.razor
│   │   │   ├── Parts/
│   │   │   │   └── PartLookup.razor
│   │   │   └── Reports/
│   │   │       └── ReportViewer.razor
│   │   └── Shared/
│   │       ├── ConfirmDialog.razor
│   │       └── StatusBadge.razor
│   └── wwwroot/
├── PrecisionParts.Core/             # Business logic (replaces VB6 classes)
│   ├── Models/                      # Domain entities
│   │   ├── User.cs
│   │   ├── Part.cs
│   │   ├── RawMaterial.cs
│   │   ├── Customer.cs
│   │   ├── WorkOrder.cs
│   │   ├── QualityCheck.cs
│   │   ├── ShippingManifest.cs
│   │   ├── ProductionLog.cs
│   │   ├── MachineStatus.cs
│   │   ├── ShiftSchedule.cs
│   │   └── InventoryTransaction.cs
│   ├── Enums/
│   │   ├── WorkOrderStatus.cs
│   │   ├── QualityCheckResult.cs
│   │   ├── UserRole.cs
│   │   └── StockStatus.cs
│   ├── Services/
│   │   ├── IWorkOrderService.cs
│   │   ├── WorkOrderService.cs
│   │   ├── IInventoryService.cs
│   │   ├── InventoryService.cs
│   │   ├── IPartService.cs
│   │   ├── PartService.cs
│   │   ├── IQualityCheckService.cs
│   │   ├── QualityCheckService.cs
│   │   ├── IShippingService.cs
│   │   └── ShippingService.cs
│   └── Validation/
│       ├── PartNumberValidator.cs
│       └── WorkOrderValidator.cs
├── PrecisionParts.Infrastructure/   # Data access (replaces modDatabase)
│   ├── Data/
│   │   ├── PrecisionPartsDbContext.cs
│   │   └── Migrations/
│   ├── Repositories/
│   │   ├── IRepository.cs
│   │   └── Repository.cs
│   └── Configuration/
│       ├── WorkOrderConfiguration.cs
│       ├── PartConfiguration.cs
│       └── ...
└── PrecisionParts.Tests/            # Unit + integration tests
    ├── Services/
    └── Validation/
```

## VB6 → .NET 9 Component Mapping

| VB6 Component       | .NET 9 Equivalent                            |
|----------------------|----------------------------------------------|
| modGlobals.bas       | DI services + IOptions<AppSettings>          |
| modDatabase.bas      | EF Core DbContext + Repository pattern       |
| modUtilities.bas     | Extension methods + helper services          |
| modPrinting.bas      | QuestPDF report generation service           |
| clsWorkOrder.cls     | WorkOrder model + WorkOrderService           |
| clsInventory.cls     | RawMaterial model + InventoryService         |
| clsPart.cls          | Part model + PartService + FluentValidation  |
| frmLogin.frm         | Login.razor + ASP.NET Core Identity          |
| frmMain.frm          | MainLayout.razor + NavMenu.razor             |
| frmInventory.frm     | InventoryList.razor (MudBlazor DataGrid)     |
| frmWorkOrder.frm     | WorkOrderEdit.razor (MudBlazor Form)         |
| frmQualityCheck.frm  | QualityCheckForm.razor                       |
| frmShipping.frm      | ShippingManifest.razor                       |
| frmPartLookup.frm    | PartLookup.razor (dialog component)          |
| frmReports.frm       | ReportViewer.razor                           |

## Key Design Decisions

### 1. Database Migration
- Access .mdb → SQL Server (EF Core migrations)
- COUNTER → int with Identity
- CURRENCY → decimal(18,2)
- MEMO → nvarchar(max)
- BIT → bool
- Proper foreign keys with cascade rules

### 2. Security Improvements
- Plain-text passwords → BCrypt hashing via ASP.NET Core Identity
- SQL string concatenation → EF Core parameterized queries
- Registry config → encrypted appsettings.json
- Hardcoded DB password → User Secrets / Azure Key Vault

### 3. Business Logic Extraction
- Hardcoded labor rate ($45/hr) → configurable via appsettings
- Hardcoded overhead (15%) → configurable via appsettings
- Hardcoded report paths → configurable via appsettings
- Global variables → scoped/transient DI services

### 4. Async Everything
- All database operations async (EF Core)
- SignalR for real-time updates (replaces VB6 timer)
- No blocking DoEvents pattern
